The '''[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] ambassador''' was the head of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui's]] delegation to the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]]. When a large number of [[True Victory Party]] members began to be assassinated by the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], he withdrew his delegation from the Senate in protest, which allowed the [[Law Enforcement Tools Provision]] to be passed. Shortly later he himself was assassinated, which caused Bothawui to recall its entire representation from Coruscant and prepare three [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] fleets for [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] service.

==Appearances==
